title: senecio mattirolii
intro: Senecio mattirolii, also known as Matiri's ragwort or Giant Ragwort, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones content. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating skin conditions. Senecio mattirolii is often used in herbal preparations, including tinctures, infusions, and topical creams, although caution is advised due to its potential toxicity and the need for proper dosing and preparation.
